steps.t: The shepherd and Lady Glánhar stand at the centre of Ost Rimmon. Lady Glánhar cannot make out what the flustered shepherd is trying to tell her. You s…
The shepherd and Lady Glánhar stand at the centre of Ost Rimmon. You should tell the shepherd's message to Lady Glánhar: that she is to meet the capto…
Lady Glánhar asked you to find Gondrad, who should be found somewhere within Ost Rimmon.
Lady Glánhar stands at the centre of Ost Rimmon. You should go with Gondrad and learn what Lady Glánhar wishes to do about the ransomer.
Go to the meeting-spot, south-east of Calenhad, on the bank above the river Sírnarthan.
Ambushers have jumped out of concealment on the way to meeting the ransomer. Defend yourself!
Continue looking for the meeting-spot, south-east of Calenhad, on the bank above the river.
The the meeting-spot is south-east of Calenhad, on the bank above the river. Talk to the Variag Captain and learn what he wants for the lives of Glánh…
Lady Glánhar stand at the centre of Ost Rimmon. You should return to Lady Glánhar with the Jarl Akhiz's demands.
